={{ JSON.stringify({ error: '❌ Image rejected: uploaded images do not appear to be property photos. ' + ($('Image Label Guardrail').first().json.reason || 'Non-property content detected.') + ' Labels detected: ' + $('Parse Image JSON').first().json.image_analysis.map(i => i.room_type).join(', ') }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ property_type: $json.property_type, location: $json.location, description: $json.description, agent_name: $json.agent_name, price_asking: $json.price_asking, size_sqm: $json.size_sqm, num_rooms: $json.num_rooms, condition: $json.condition, intent: $json.intent, image_analysis: $json.image_analysis }) }}

value.analysis: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: '❌ Processing error: ' + ($input.first().json.error?.message || $input.first().json.message || 'Service unavailable — please resubmit') }) }}

parameters.systemMessage:
Return pass=true if ALL labels describe real estate or property-related content:
  - Interior spaces: bedroom, living room, kitchen, bathroom, dining room, hallway, corridor, staircase
  - Exterior spaces: building exterior, garden, yard, balcony, terrace, parking, garage, driveway
  - Commercial spaces: office, workspace, meeting room, retail space

Return pass=false if ANY label describes content unrelated to property:
  - Animals (cat, dog, bird, any pet or wildlife)
  - People or portraits
  - Food or beverages
  - Vehicles (car, motorcycle, truck)
  - Natural landscapes without buildings
  - Documents, screens or phones
  - Random or unidentifiable objects
